concerns.text: FR-007 anchors to 'Methodological Soundness & Compute Feasibility' which is not a defined User Story. While the constraint is valid, it lacks a direct story anchor (e.g., US-1, US-2, or a new 'Feasibility' story). It should be re-anchored to the specific story it enables (likely US-1 or US-2) or a new story added.

SC-004 anchors to 'US-2, US-3'. While acceptable, SC-004 (memory usage) is a constraint on the execution of the SVD (US-1) and the training (US-2). It is slightly ambiguous if it covers the OPD baseline (US-1) fully. Consider clarifying if it applies to all variants or just the hybrid.

SC-005 anchors to 'Methodological Soundness'. Similar to FR-007, this is a non-functional constraint (time limit) not explicitly tied to a specific User Story. It should be anchored to the story describing the full pipeline execution or the specific stories (US-1, US-2, US-3) that constitute the pipeline.
